name: Money N Minutes
description_short: Kansas-based line of credit lender offering quick cash loans up to same-day funding for residents of Johnson County near Overland Park, with flexible repayment schedules.
description_long:
Money 'N Minutes is a Kansas-based lender that has operated in the Kansas City and Midwest region for more than 18 years, establishing itself as a localized alternative to national payday lenders. The company specializes in lines of credit designed for customers facing temporary cash flow problems or financial emergencies who need quick access to funds for a short-term period. They serve the Johnson County, Kansas area, particularly the Overland Park region, and explicitly position themselves against "fly-by-night operations" by emphasizing their long operational history and commitment to customer service.

Money 'N Minutes offers both online and in-person application pathways for lines of credit. Online applicants can complete their application, have it reviewed, accept an offer, and receive funds the same day or next business day via direct bank deposit. In-person applicants at their Overland Park location can walk out with cash after the same three-step process. The company advertises a quick process, no hidden fees, and flexible payment schedules. Repayment is simplified through automatic payment setup at contract signing, with funds debited on scheduled due dates.

The company distinguishes itself through its localized, relationship-focused approach. Rather than a fully digital-first model, Money 'N Minutes maintains a physical storefront with dedicated loan supervisors and emphasizes personal interaction and expert guidance through the application process. Their marketing consistently references their 18+ year tenure in the region and positions their team as the foundation of their business, contrasting with the cost-cutting measures of larger competitors.

A honest assessment reveals significant limitations: the company serves only Kansas residents in the Johnson County area, making it inaccessible to most consumers. Loan amounts and APRs are never disclosed on their website, which is a red flag for transparency. They explicitly exclude military members from eligibility. The company does not provide standard loan amount ranges (they reference "emergency cash" positioning but no specific limits), making it impossible to determine if this truly serves the $100-$1K emergency market or extends into larger personal loan territory. No information about credit requirements or approval rates is disclosed.
pros: Same-day or next-business-day funding available for both online and in-person applications
Online application option eliminates need to visit physical location, reducing time and logistical barriers
Automatic payment setup at signing prevents missed payments and simplifies repayment process
18+ years of operational history in Kansas City and Midwest region, suggesting stability and local reputation
In-person loan supervisors provide guided application process with detailed explanation of loan terms
No hidden fees explicitly advertised as a core benefit
Flexible payment schedules designed for customers with temporary cash flow problems
cons: Geographic limitation: serves only Kansas residents in Johnson County area near Overland Park; not available nationwide
Complete lack of transparency on website regarding loan amounts, APRs, or terms—no pricing information disclosed
Excludes military members from eligibility without explanation
No information provided about minimum credit score requirements, approval rates, or qualification criteria beyond basic employment and banking requirements
Website does not clarify actual loan product limits or maximum amounts, making it unclear if this is true emergency lending or extends into personal loan territory
best_for: Kansas residents in Johnson County facing unexpected short-term expenses who prefer in-person guidance
Applicants seeking same-day cash access who have full-time employment and an active bank account
Local borrowers in the Overland Park area who value relationship-based lending and long-term lender stability
diagnosis: Money 'N Minutes is best for Kansas residents in Johnson County who need emergency cash within 1-2 business days and prefer working with a local lender offering in-person support. The primary caveat is severe geographic limitation (Kansas only) combined with a complete absence of pricing transparency—potential borrowers must apply to discover loan amounts, APRs, and actual terms.
services: Online line of credit application with same-day or next-business-day funding
In-person line of credit application at Overland Park, Kansas storefront location
Direct bank account deposit of loan funds
Automatic payment setup and authorization at contract signing
Loan document review and explanation by loan supervisors
Background check as part of application process
